title: Cancel all open orders before repositioning grid each cycle

requirements.text: In the backend trading loop (tradingLoop() in backend/main.mo), before placing new grid orders each cycle, unconditionally cancel ALL currently open orders by calling the ICDex canister's cancelOrder() for each open order fetched via getOpenOrders(). Only after all cancellations are complete should the new grid orders be placed. No comparison logic, no selective cancellation — cancel every open order on every cycle before repositioning.

quotes: Cancelar todas antigas antes de Reposicionar.

acceptanceCriteria: Every open order is cancelled at the start of each tradingLoop() cycle before any new order is placed.
No stale orders accumulate across cycles.
After cancellation completes, the new grid orders are placed using the dynamic $10/midPrice quantity formula.
No smart comparison logic or selective cancellation is introduced — the cancel-all approach is unconditional.
The trading loop continues to function correctly (fetch mid-price → compute grid → cancel all → place all).

constraints: Do not modify any frontend files.
Do not introduce smart/selective grid comparison logic — cancel ALL open orders unconditionally each cycle.
Preserve existing dynamic order quantity calculation: quantity = 10 / midPrice.
Do not change existing public API functions (getBotStatus, getConfig, setConfig, getLastMidPrice, getLastGrid, getOpenOrders, getIcpBalance, getCkUsdtBalance).
nonGoals: Smart grid repositioning (cancel only out-of-range orders).
Any new public query or update functions.
